text_excerpt: Get Involved! | Bob Blackman Skip to main content Main navigation About Bob & Harrow East News & Speeches Subscribe to Bob's e-Newsletter Contact Get Involved! Get Involved! Tweet Here you can find many ways to get involved, including current surveys, polls, petitions and Bob's Harrow Residents' Survey, which you are welcome to fill in. Campaigns Save Harrow Police Station! Help us reverse Sadiq Khan and the Met Police's decision to close Harrow Police Station's front desk. Lifts at Stanmore Station! It has been a long 20 years trying to achieve this goal however we may finally be nearing the point where we have proper step-free access installed.Recently it was announced that Queensbury and Canons Park stations have made Transport for London’s shortlist to improve accessibility. Stop the Family Farm Tax Labour have broken their promise to British farmers with the Family Farm Tax. Labour's Family Farm Tax will stop farms being passed to the next generation Threatening our food security Risking jobs Leading to food prices ri Stop Labour's tax on bus travel Stop Labour's 50% bus fare hike. Labour's plans to raise bus fares from £2 to £3 mean hard-working people commuting every day will pay £520 a year more. Sign our petition to stop this. This petition will be presented to the Labour Party. Stop the grooming gangs It's time to get justice for victims. The only way to expose those who turned a blind eye to the grooming gangs is by holding a full inquiry, so sign our petition. Add your name and sign the petition to demand a full inquiry into the grooming gangs and those who turned a Save our local pubs Labour's War on Pubs Will Close Your Local Labour's pub tax hike will force landlords to raise prices or shut their doors for good. £1,000s extra in business rates per pub £800 extra per worker in National Insurance Higher Petition: Common sense immigration rules Our country is not a hotel, it is our home. Bob's Residents' Survey 2025 Every year I conduct a survey of residents so that I can act on your concerns, champion what matters to you and deliver what you want to see.Since being re-elected as your Member of Parliament, I have been busy delivering on the priorities you told me mattered: crime, schools, housing, the NHS, busi Changes to Employer National Insurance Contributions Labour announced several tax rises in the Autumn Budget, particularly the increase to employer National Insurance contributions (NICs). Bob Blackman calls for Labour to reintroduce the universal Winter Fuel Payments Bob Blackman CBE MP has launched a survey to hear the concerns of local residents on the Government's recent announcement to cut Winter Fuel Payments to pensioners. In response to the Governments proposals, the Conservative Party has submitted an Early Day Motion to challenge the government's decis Edgware Towers APPROVED by Labour Labour-run Barnet have APPROVED the Edgware TowersIgnoring the wishes of residents, businesses and local communities.Now more than ever, we need to step up our efforts. Bob's #EndKnifeCrime Campaign Over 1,000 Londoners have been killed in the capital since Sadiq Khan became Mayor. Knife crime is so bad in London that it has skewed the national average, despite knife crime falling elsewhere across the country. This cannot go on. Please complete Bob's Crime Survey to have your say on what our Register to Vote, or need a Postal Vote? If you would like details on registering to vote, or to request a postal vote, complete the form below. Let us know what you can do to help Winning is hard.That's why incredible volunteers like you make all the difference.Please let us know what you can do to help by completing the quick survey below. GIVE YOUR VIEW: A Conservative-run Harrow Council The Conservatives took control of Harrow Council in May 2022. Bob is keen to hear your views on how you think it is going, what you would like to see in Harrow and other important topics! You can complete Bob's survey below to take part. See A
